description: Hand-curated expectations for the NCR notification & quality case escalation. Values are constraints the synthesis must satisfy, not exact outputs.

required_topics.rationale: Problem 1 of the meeting was a proactive NCR/CAPA action notification. Must be picked up.
Problem 2 was client-scoped (IdentityVault) delivery so notifications don't go to the wrong person on a shared enterprise account.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Voice-call reminders were explicitly declined in the meeting.
NCR alerts on the MES shop-floor terminal were explicitly declined.

expected_duplicates.rationale: QT-176 is the in-backlog NCR push-notification ticket carrying the SMS fallback scope, explicitly called out in the meeting as the existing work — any new SMS-notification story should be flagged as a duplicate.

expected_constraint_conflicts.rationale: Surfacing a specific NCR number and controlled article ID in a push notification requires explicit client consent, verified contact method, and a 10-year audit log per the GDPR/ITAR rules in Section 3 of architecture_constraints.md. Any story proposing this without those guardrails should be flagged.
